name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state

(* State can be "idle", "trying", or "critical" *)
Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "trying"
          /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ state[i] = "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
        \/ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, participants
VARIABLES coordinator, participantStates


vars == << coordinator, participantStates >>

Init == 
    /\ coordinator = "INIT"
    /\ participantStates = [p \in participants |-> "IDLE"]

Prepare == 
    /\ coordinator = "INIT"
    /\ coordinator' = "PREPARE"
    /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

VoteYes == 
    /\ coordinator = "PREPARE"
    /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "IDLE"
    /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "VOTED_YES"
    /\ coordinator' = "COMMIT"
    /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

VoteNo == 
    /\ coordinator = "PREPARE"
    /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "IDLE"
    /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "VOTED_NO"
    /\ coordinator' = "ABORT"
    /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

Commit == 
    /\ coordinator = "COMMIT"
    /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "VOTED_YES"
    /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "COMMITTED"
    /\ coordinator' = "COMMITTED"
    /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

Abort == 
    /\ coordinator = "ABORT"
    /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "VOTED_YES" \/ participantStates[p] = "VOTED_NO"
    /\ \A p \in participants: participantStates[p] = "ABORTED"
    /\ coordinator' = "ABORTED"
    /\ UNCHANGED participantStates

Next == 
    \/ Prepare
    \/ VoteYes
    \/ VoteNo
    \/ Commit
    \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N > 0

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == forks = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> -1] /\ states = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == (i - 1) MOD N
Right(i) == (i + 1) MOD N

(* State transitions *)
PickUp(i) == forks[i] = -1 /\ forks[Left(i)] = -1 /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Left(i)] = i] /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
PutDown(i) == forks[i] = i /\ forks[Left(i)] = i /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![Left(i)] = -1] /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
Hungry(i) == states[i] = "thinking" /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
Eat(i) == states[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = -1 /\ forks[Left(i)] = -1 /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Left(i)] = i] /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
DoneEating(i) == states[i] = "eating" /\ forks[i] = i /\ forks[Left(i)] = i /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![Left(i)] = -1] /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Next == \E i \in 0..N-1: PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i) \/ Hungry(i) \/ Eat(i) \/ DoneEating(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ LET maxNum == Max(Seq(num))
             IN num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>
====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES queue, head, tail, size

vars == <<queue, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ queue = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ queue[tail] = 0
                 /\ queue' = [queue EXCEPT ![tail] = 1]
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ queue[head] = 1
                 /\ queue' = [queue EXCEPT ![head] = 0]
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL, Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [s \in Server |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]

Next == \/ (* Follower *)
           /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Follower"]
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = state
       \/ (* Candidate *)
           /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Candidate"]
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
           /\ votedFor' = [s \in Server |-> NULL]
           /\ state' = state
       \/ (* Leader *)
           /\ state = [s \in Server |-> "Leader"]
           /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
           /\ votedFor' = votedFor
           /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
    /\ readers = {}
    /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
    \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
       /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ readers' = readers \cup {r}
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
    \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
       /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ readers' = readers \ {r}
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
    \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
       /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
    \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
       /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES N, channels, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotRecorded



vars == <<N, channels, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotRecorded>>

Init == /\ N = 3
        /\ channels = [i \in 1..N -> [j \in 1..N |-> []]]
        /\ localState = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ channelState = [i \in 1..N -> [j \in 1..N |-> []]]
        /\ markerSent = [i \in 1..N -> [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]]
        /\ markerReceived = [i \in 1..N -> [j \in 1..N |-> FALSE]]
        /\ snapshotRecorded = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![i] = localState[i] + 1]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ snapshotRecorded[i] = TRUE
                           /\ \E j \in 1..N : channels[i][j] = []
                           /\ channels' = [channels EXCEPT ![i][j] = Append(channels[i][j], "marker")]
                           /\ markerSent' = [markerSent EXCEPT ![i][j] = TRUE]
        /\ \E i \in 1..N : /\ \E j \in 1..N : channels[i][j] = ["marker"]
                           /\ channels' = [channels EXCEPT ![i][j] = Tail(channels[i][j])]
                           /\ markerReceived' = [markerReceived EXCEPT ![i][j] = TRUE]
                           /\ \A k \in 1..N : markerReceived[i][k]
                           /\ snapshotRecorded' = [snapshotRecorded EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
                           /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = channels[i]]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<N, channels, localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived, snapshotRecorded>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == token = 1

Next == \E i \in 1..N : token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS NULL

VARIABLES store

Keys == {"k1", "k2", "k3"}
Values == {"v1", "v2", "v3"}

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        /\ k \in Keys
        /\ v \in Values

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [promised |-> 0, accepted |-> <<0, 0>>]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
  /\ chosen = 0

Next == 
  \/ \E i \in 1..M : 
    /\ proposers' = [proposers EXCEPT ![i] = [ballot : proposers[i].ballot + 1, value : proposers[i].value]]
    /\ acceptors' = acceptors
    /\ chosen' = chosen
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i] = [promised : acceptors[i].promised, accepted : acceptors[i].accepted]]
    /\ proposers' = proposers
    /\ chosen' = chosen
  \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
    /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i] = [promised : acceptors[i].promised, accepted : acceptors[i].accepted]]
    /\ proposers' = proposers
    /\ chosen' = chosen

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, FiniteSet
VARIABLES acked_chunks, chunks, file, retransmit_counts, sent_chunks, status


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ file \in Seq(Int)
    /\ chunks \in Seq(Seq(Int))
    /\ sent_chunks \in FiniteSet(Seq(Int))
    /\ acked_chunks \in FiniteSet(Seq(Int))
    /\ retransmit_counts \in [Seq(Int) -> Nat]
    /\ status \in {"transmitting", "waiting_ack", "completed", "failed"}

(* Initialize the file transfer *)
Init == 
    /\ file = Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> 
        SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + 1, Min(i*CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE))]
    /\ sent_chunks = {}
    /\ acked_chunks = {}
    /\ retransmit_counts = [c \in chunks |-> 0]
    /\ status = "transmitting"

(* Send a chunk over the unreliable channel *)
SendChunk(chunk) == 
    /\ chunk \in chunks
    /\ chunk \notin sent_chunks
    /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup {chunk}
    /\ retransmit_counts' = [retransmit_counts EXCEPT ![chunk] = @ + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acked_chunks, status>>

(* Receive an acknowledgment for a chunk *)
ReceiveAck(chunk) == 
    /\ chunk \in sent_chunks
    /\ chunk \notin acked_chunks
    /\ acked_chunks' = acked_chunks \cup {chunk}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sent_chunks, retransmit_counts, status>>

(* Check if all chunks have been acknowledged *)
AllChunksAcked == 
    acked_chunks = Set(chunks)

(* Check if any chunk has exceeded the maximum number of retransmissions *)
AnyChunkFailed == 
    \E chunk \in sent_chunks : retransmit_counts[chunk] > MAX_RETRIES

(* Transition relation *)
Next == 
    \E chunk \in chunks :
        /\ status = "transmitting"
        /\ \E send \in {TRUE, FALSE} :
            /\ send
            /\ SendChunk(chunk)
        \/ \E ack \in {TRUE, FALSE} :
            /\ ack
            /\ ReceiveAck(chunk)
        \/ /\ status = "waiting_ack"
            /\ AllChunksAcked
            /\ status' = "completed"
            /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sent_chunks, acked_chunks, retransmit_counts>>
        \/ /\ status = "waiting_ack"
            /\ AnyChunkFailed
            /\ status' = "failed"
            /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sent_chunks, acked_chunks, retransmit_counts>>

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sent_chunks, acked_chunks, retransmit_counts, status>> 

====
